highlights.text: Family / Desert Discovery — MAPAI breakfast & dinner
Sunset camel safari and folk dance at Sam Sand Dunes
Mehrangarh Fort, Umaid Bhawan, Jaisalmer Living Fort

itinerary.title: Jodhpur Jaisalmer Desert Discovery
itinerary.overview: Embark on an extraordinary journey through the heart of the Thar Desert with this signature Desert Discovery itinerary. Tailored for discerning families, this bespoke circuit takes you from the striking Blue City of Jodhpur to the shimmering golden ramparts of Jaisalmer. Travel in complete luxury with a dedicated private premium vehicle, savor gourmet daily breakfasts and dinners, and indulge in exclusive local experiences carefully arranged by TRAGUIN. Route: Jodhpur (2N) → Sam Sand Dunes (1N) → Jaisalmer City (2N). Best season: October to March.
itinerary.seo_title: RJ-003 | Jodhpur Jaisalmer Desert Discovery | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Rajasthan family tour (RJ-003): Jodhpur, Sam Sand Dunes desert camp, Jaisalmer Living Fort, Patwon ki Haveli, and sunset camel safari.

highlights.text: Sam Sand Dunes sunset camel safari
Patwon ki Haveli & Kuldhara Ghost Village

days.title: Arrival in Jodhpur | Welcome to the Blue City
days.description: Traditional royal greeting at Jodhpur airport or railway station. Priority check-in at handpicked premium heritage hotel. Afternoon visit Jaswant Thada and Clock Tower local bazaars.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jaswant Thada, Ghanta Ghar (Clock Tower) & Local Bazaars
Evening Experience: Leisured walk through traditional Spice Markets and heritage lanes
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Hotel / Heritage Resort in Jodhpur
Meals Included: Dinner

days.title: Jodhpur Sightseeing | Mighty Mehrangarh & Royal Legacies
days.description: Full-day Jodhpur sightseeing at Mehrangarh Fort with expert guide, Sheesh Mahal, Phool Mahal, and Umaid Bhawan Palace Museum. Optional Flying Fox zipline adventure.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mehrangarh Fort, Sheesh Mahal, Phool Mahal, Umaid Bhawan Palace Museum
Optional Activities: Thrilling Flying Fox (Zipline) adventure over Mehrangarh Fort
Evening Experience: Exclusive rooftop dinner overlooking illuminated Mehrangarh Fort
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Hotel / Heritage Resort in Jodhpur
Meals Included: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer Desert | Journey to the Golden Sand Dunes
days.description: Scenic drive to Sam Sand Dunes. Traditional welcome at luxury tented desert camp. Sunset camel safari with optional 4x4 jeep dune bashing. Evening folk dance and traditional dinner under stars.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic drive through the Thar Desert, traditional rural desert vistas
Optional Activities: 4x4 Jeep Safari, Quad Biking, or Paramotoring over dunes
Evening Experience: Sunset camel ride, live folk dance, cultural music, and stargazing
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Desert Camp (AC Swiss Tents) at Sam Sand Dunes
Meals Included: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Jaisalmer Desert to Jaisalmer City | The Living Fort
days.description: Desert sunrise, then transfer to Jaisalmer City. Explore Jaisalmer Fort (Sonar Qila), Patwon ki Haveli, Nathmal ki Haveli, and Salim Singh ki Haveli. Evening visit Gadisar Lake.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon ki Haveli, Nathmal ki Haveli, Salim Singh ki Haveli
Evening Experience: Scenic evening visit to Gadisar Lake surrounded by shrines
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Hotel / Palace Heritage Property in Jaisalmer
Meals Included: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Jaisalmer Heritage Exploration | Haunted Legends & Imperial Cenotaphs
days.description: Visit Bada Bagh royal cenotaphs, Kuldhara Ghost Village, and Vyas Chhatri. Afternoon leisure for shopping Jaisalmer souvenirs — leather goods, sandstone carvings, and traditional jewelry.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Bada Bagh Cenotaphs, Kuldhara Ghost Village, Vyas Chhatri
Evening Experience: Relaxed sunset view at Vyas Chhatri
Overnight Stay: Premium Luxury Hotel / Palace Heritage Property in Jaisalmer
Meals Included: Breakfast & Dinner

days.title: Departure from Jaisalmer / Jodhpur | Bidding Farewell to Marwar
days.description: Final breakfast and private transfer to Jaisalmer or Jodhpur airport/railway station for onward journey.
activities: Transfers Included: Private drop-off at Jaisalmer or Jodhpur Airport / Railway Station
Meals Included: Breakfast

inclusions.text: 05 Nights stay in highly rated handpicked hotels and luxury desert camps
Gourmet meal plan: daily breakfast and dinners throughout the trip
Private air-conditioned premium vehicle for all transfers and sightseeing
Sunset camel safari and evening cultural folk dance with traditional dinner buffet
Traditional royal welcome greeting and personalized assistance upon arrival
24/7 dedicated TRAGUIN digital concierge support, package taxes, and driver allowances
Airfare / railfare to and from Jodhpur/Jaisalmer
Monuments entry fees, camera fees for forts, palaces, and museums
Optional adventure: ziplining, 4x4 jeep safari, quad biking, paramotoring
Personal expenses: laundry, telephone, alcoholic drinks, tips, extra meals
Comprehensive medical or trip cancellation travel insurance
